Routine surveillance activities (alert reporting, investigations, active case search, contact listing and follow-up, retrospective case and death record review). In-depth investigations around confirmed cases in affected health zones (Bunia, Nyankunde and Rwampara). Alerts: 97 raised, 97 investigated (100%), 72 validated (74.2%). Contact tracing: 4,281 contacts under follow-up, 2,701 seen (63.1%) — improvement vs previous day (54.6%).
Alerts: 340 raised, 340 investigated (100%), 40 validated (11.8%). Contact tracing: 689 contacts under follow-up, 578 seen (83.9%) — improvement vs previous day (72.0%).

Deployment of a national PoE/PoC supervisor in Mongbwalu HZ. Activation of Pont Shari PoC. Indicators: 12/55 PoC activated (21.8%); 22,547 travellers passed, 98.2% screened (2.0% refusal), 97.4% handwashing (2.6% refusal), 98.4% sensitised; 3 alerts notified, 2 investigated (66.6%), 1 validated, 1 transferred to CT/ETC or for SDB.
